name: auto-develop
description: Autonomous local task-execution loop. Takes a high-level goal, builds ROADMAP.md, and implements tasks one by one with planner, dev, test, review, land, and replan steps. No GitHub — all commits land locally.

seed-plan.name: Seed Plan
seed-plan.description: Creates ROADMAP.md and ARCHITECTURE.md from the user's high-level goal. Runs once at workflow start.

initialized.description: true if ROADMAP.md and ARCHITECTURE.md were created or validated successfully

pick-next.name: Pick Next Task
pick-next.description: Reads ROADMAP.md and picks the first pending [ ] task. Succeeds (workflow exits) when all tasks are done; fails (routes to develop) when a task remains.

line.description: Line number of the task in ROADMAP.md

done.description: true when no pending [ ] tasks remain — triggers workflow exit

develop.name: Developer Agent
develop.description: Implements the current task. Succeeds (routes to test) when implementation is ready; fails (routes to mark-blocked) after exhausting retries.

implementation_ready.description: true if implementation is complete and ready for testing; false if giving up after exhausting retries

attempt_count.description: Current attempt number for this task (starts at 1, incremented on each retry)

summary.description: Brief summary of what was implemented, or why the task is being marked blocked

test.name: Test Runner
test.description: Runs the project's test suite. On failure, routes back to develop with output and attempt count.

results.description: Full test output including failure messages and stack traces

review.name: Reviewer Agent
review.description: Reviews the implementation against ARCHITECTURE.md and the task. Approves (routes to land) or rejects (routes to develop with feedback).

approved.description: true if the implementation is correct and ready to land

review.description: Review feedback explaining what needs to change

land.name: Land
land.description: Merges the isolated develop branch into the source branch with a commit. Local only — no push.

on_success.message:
The task was successfully completed and landed. Its line in ROADMAP.md is still '- [ ]' — mark it '- [x]' as Step 0 before doing anything else.

Task: ${steps.pick-next.output.task}

landed.description: true if the branch was merged and committed successfully

commit_sha.description: SHA of the merge commit on the source branch

replan.name: Replanner
replan.description: Marks the completed or blocked task in ROADMAP.md, updates ARCHITECTURE.md, and optionally adds/reorders pending tasks. Commits changes then loops back to pick-next.

added_tasks.description: Array of new task description strings added to ROADMAP.md

architecture_updated.description: true if ARCHITECTURE.md was updated with new decisions

mark-blocked.name: Mark Blocked
mark-blocked.description: Tags the current task as blocked in ROADMAP.md with a reason comment, then commits and routes to replan.

reason.description: Brief explanation of why the task was blocked
